title: Image mode testing via Packit
body:
I see image mode composes are available in testing-farm. Any pros/cons to enabling image mode jobs in upstream CI? 

@mtrmac @vrothberg @thrix wdyt?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing this for now. Will reopen when I can actually get to it.

> Any pros/cons to enabling image mode jobs in upstream CI?

I think it just makes sense to have upstream CI jobs, yes.
